name: Forbid Committing CMake Artifacts
description: The repository must not contain CMakeFiles/ or CMakeCache.txt.
reason:
题目要求（README.md 417-422 行）：**IMPORTANT**: You must create a `.gitignore` file in your project root directory to avoid OJ evaluation conflicts. The `.gitignore` file should include at least the following entries:

```gitignore
CMakeFiles/
CMakeCache.txt
```

name: Ensure CMakeLists Outputs code Executable
description: Provide a CMakeLists.txt that produces an executable named code.
reason: 题目要求（README.md 411 行）：After this process is complete, we will use the `code` file in the project root directory as the compilation result.

name: Disallow Persistent Main Data
description: Check whether the implementation avoids keeping primary data permanently in memory.

name: Forbid Filesystem-as-Database Design
description: Check the code does not implement a filesystem-as-database style design.

name: Overall Project Readability and Organization Structure
description: Assess overall project readability, code organization, and structure clarity.
